final:
// // This module implements a flash memory cell that supports a simple read and write operation. It has inputs for the write disable signal (WD), the data output (DO), and a clock signal (CLK). The output should be the data stored in the memory cell (DI). On the falling edge of the CLK, if WD is asserted, the data output (DO) should be written to the memory cell. If WD is not asserted, the stored data should be available at the output (DI) without change.
module flash_memory_cell (
    input wire CLK,
    input wire WE,
    input wire [7:0] DI,
    output reg [7:0] DO
);
    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            DO <= DI;  // Write data to memory cell
        end
        // else DO retains its previous state (read operation)
    end
endmodule

It has inputs for the write disable signal (WD), the data output (DO), and a clock signal (CLK). The output should be the data stored in the memory cell (DI). On the falling edge of the CLK, if WD is asserted, the data output (DO) should be written to the memory cell. If WD is not asserted, the stored data should be available at the output (DI) without change.
